channel.title: themes - Psycholinguistics Laboratory
channel.description: Recent content in themes on Psycholinguistics Laboratory

item.title: equipment
item.description: This is a list of the equipment - hardware and software - present in the lab and available for use by researchers and students. If you have any specific question about model or version numbers, please get in touch with us and we will be happy to provide further clarifications. Sound-proof experimental booth with 4 experimental positions. Audio recording equipment (Zoom recorders, microphones, headphones) Ohmmeter and decibelometer Storage space ELECTRO ENCEPHALOGRAPHY
